floor1TrophyRoom.name: Projector
floor1TrophyRoom.description: A machine that plays back vivid memories. Just close your eyes and concentrate...

floor1TrophyRoom.name: First Shipped
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [First Shipped] Delicious crops and beautiful accessories. I want to see everyone's smiling faces!
floor1TrophyRoom.requirements: Sell an item through your Shipping Bin.

floor1TrophyRoom.name: First Date
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [First Date] Erm, who did I go on a date with, again? I couldn't possibly have forgotten...

floor1TrophyRoom.name: First Catch
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [First Catch] It's a quiet but exciting battle with some wily fishies. Exciting!

floor1TrophyRoom.name: First Pet
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [First Friendly Monster] There's no border between man and beast. At heart, we're all but monsters!

floor1TrophyRoom.name: First Cold Caught
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [First Cold Caught] If you're tired, take a break. You wouldn't want to worry those close to you!

floor1TrophyRoom.name: First Request
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [First Request Solved] It's a beautiful thing to help someone. Hang onto this feeling always!

floor1TrophyRoom.name: First Bath
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [First Bath] No, not literally! Just my first time bathing at an inn. Sheesh! I'm not THAT gross!
floor1TrophyRoom.requirements: Take a bath at the inn.

floor1TrophyRoom.name: Difficulty Setting
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [Game Difficulty: ____ ] There are also ____ and ____ difficulties.
floor1TrophyRoom.requirements: Initially available; choose between Easy, Normal, and Difficult.

floor1TrophyRoom.name: Bean Throw. Trophy
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [Bean Toss Contest Trophy]Ack! So much Failed Dish!

floor1TrophyRoom.name: De-Fluffing Trophy
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [De-Fluffing Festival Trophy]I want to sink into a big Wooly.

floor1TrophyRoom.name: Fish. Frenzy Trophy
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [Fishing Frenzy Contest Trophy]The proof you won Fishing Frenzy Contest. Fish! Fish! Fiiish!

floor1TrophyRoom.name: Big Catch Trophy
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [Big Catch Contest Trophy]You are the Big Catch Contest champ! Yours is bigger than anyone's!

floor1TrophyRoom.name: Squid Catch Trophy
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [Squid Catch Contest Trophy]You conquered the Squid Catch Contest. You're an epic fisherman!

floor1TrophyRoom.name: Variety Trophy
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [Fish Variety Contest Trophy]Fish Variety Contest was all yours. Every fish begs your pardon.

floor1TrophyRoom.name: Eating Con. Trophy
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [Eating Contest Trophy]Food is not drink. Chew it!

floor1TrophyRoom.name: Target Prac. Trophy
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [Turnip Festival Trophy]Hit two turnips with one ball.

floor1TrophyRoom.name: Turnip Con. Trophy
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [Turnip Flurry Trophy]Turnips! Give me some turnips!

floor1TrophyRoom.name: Spr. Harvest Trophy
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [Spring Harvest Festival Trophy]Yours shone the brightest. Be proud!

floor1TrophyRoom.name: Sum. Harvest Trophy
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [Summer Harvest Festival Trophy]Yours shone the brightest. Be proud!

floor1TrophyRoom.name: Aut. Harvest Trophy
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [Autumn Harvest Festival Trophy]Yours shone the brightest. Be proud!

floor1TrophyRoom.name: Win. Harvest Trophy
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [Winter Harvest Festival Trophy]Yours shone the brightest. Be proud!

floor1TrophyRoom.name: Quiz Contest Trophy
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [Quiz Contest Trophy]What a genius you are! This is a trophy for a real Quiz King!

floor1TrophyRoom.name: Buddy Battle Trophy
floor1TrophyRoom.description: [Buddy Battle Trophy]Thank you for taking care of me. Master, did I make you proud?

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Cooking Con. Trophy
floor2TrophyRoom.description: [Cooking Contest Trophy]You've mastered cooking. Next up...is love and marriage!

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Handicraft Trophy
floor2TrophyRoom.description: [Handicraft Contest Trophy]You're a forging master! Strike while the iron is hot!

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Illustration Contest
floor2TrophyRoom.description: View images drawn by fans for the fifth anniversary of the Rune Factory series.

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Wedding Photo
floor2TrophyRoom.description: [Your Wedding Photo]It's a photo of ____ and ____ . Best wishes!
floor2TrophyRoom.requirements: Get married. Examine this trophy to change nicknames or to replay your wedding day.

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Fin. Rune Factory 4
floor2TrophyRoom.description: [Completed Rune Factory 4]Congratulations! You've definitely earned this trophy!

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Beloved By All
floor2TrophyRoom.description: [Beloved By All]Everybody loves you. This is your proof of everlasting friendship.
floor2TrophyRoom.requirements: Raise friendship level of everyone to 10.

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Saved 10,000,000 G
floor2TrophyRoom.description: [Saved 10,000,000 Gold]Penny pincher, or just got good business sense? Either way, wow!

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Five Years Passed
floor2TrophyRoom.description: [Five Years Passed]Hope you've built up lots of wonderful memories!
floor2TrophyRoom.requirements: Spend 5 years in-game. The time skip does not count.

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Shipped All Items
floor2TrophyRoom.description: [Shipped All Items]You are a true master of Rune Factory 4. Simply amazing!
floor2TrophyRoom.requirements: Ship all the items at least once.

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Had a Baby
floor2TrophyRoom.description: [Had a Baby]Your baby is the crystallization of your dreams, hopes and love.

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Built the Biggest Monster Barn
floor2TrophyRoom.description: [Built the Biggest Monster Barn]Any new monsters out there? If so, you're totally ready for'em!
floor2TrophyRoom.requirements: Build and expand all Monster Barns.

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Made it to Lv. 1,000
floor2TrophyRoom.description: [Made it to Level 1,000]Finally, you hit the thousand mark! This road...has no end

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Sharance Trophy
floor2TrophyRoom.description: You completed the "_________" in Sharance Maze. ____________________.
floor2TrophyRoom.requirements: Complete a section of the Sharance Maze.

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Masu Trout Trophy
floor2TrophyRoom.description: Caught Masu Trout!

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Squid Trophy
floor2TrophyRoom.description: Caught Squid!

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Taimen Trophy
floor2TrophyRoom.description: Caught Taimen!

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Sardine Trophy
floor2TrophyRoom.description: Caught Sardine!

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Char Trophy
floor2TrophyRoom.description: Caught Char!

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Chub Trophy
floor2TrophyRoom.description: Caught Chub!

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Glitter Snp. Trophy
floor2TrophyRoom.description: Caught Glitter Snapper!

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Skipjack Trophy
floor2TrophyRoom.description: Caught Skipjack!

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Turbot Trophy
floor2TrophyRoom.description: Caught Turbot!

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Gibelio Trophy
floor2TrophyRoom.description: Caught Gibelio!

floor2TrophyRoom.name: Salmon Trophy
floor2TrophyRoom.description: Caught Salmon!
